signals.title: Scaling Laws of Scientific Discovery with AI and Robot Scientists

content.abstract: Proposes Autonomous Generalist Scientists (AGS) concept fusing agentic AI and embodied robotics to fully automate research lifecycles. Demonstrates scaling laws for AI-driven scientific discovery.

signals.title: Safety in Large Reasoning Models: Unique Challenges Beyond Standard LLM Safety

content.abstract: Argues Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) pose unique safety challenges requiring dedicated analysis beyond general LLM safety. Chain-of-thought reasoning creates novel attack surfaces not present in standard LLMs.

signals.title: Efficiency vs Demand in AI Electricity: Post-AGI Scaling Implications

content.abstract: Analyzes the tension between AI efficiency gains and total electricity demand growth. Models show data center electricity could double by 2026. Post-AGI scenarios project 5-10x current consumption by 2030.

signals.title: Vision-Language-Action Models on Soft Robots: Bridging Embodiment Gaps

content.abstract: Demonstrates deployment of VLA models on soft robots, bridging the gap between simulated and physical embodied AI. Achieves 78% task success rate on previously unseen manipulation tasks.

signals.title: Quantum Computing Strategic Recommendations for Industry 2026

content.abstract: Industry whitepaper surveying short-to-mid-term prospects for quantum-enabled optimization and ML in industrial settings. Assesses hardware maturity across architectures.

signals.title: Deliberative Alignment via Legal Precedent Reasoning for LLM Safety

content.abstract: Proposes case-augmented deliberative alignment using legal precedent reasoning to improve LLM safety without over-refusal. Demonstrates that precedent-based approaches reduce false refusal rates by 34% while maintaining safety.

signals.title: AI and Net-Zero: Energy Demand, Emissions, and Transition Potential

content.abstract: Comprehensive analysis of AI's dual role in climate: AI as energy consumer vs. AI as climate solution. Finds AI-driven optimization could reduce industrial emissions by 25% but AI energy demand growth could offset 40% of those gains.

signals.title: DIG to Heal: Scaling General-Purpose Agent Collaboration via Explainable Decision Paths

content.abstract: Proposes explainable dynamic decision paths for scaling multi-agent AI collaboration. Demonstrates 3.2x improvement in task completion rate for complex multi-step workflows.

signals.title: Ethical Reasoning vs Safety Alignment Tension in LLMs

content.abstract: Examines how safety alignment's binary safe/unsafe framework proves insufficient for ethical dilemmas. LLMs trained with standard RLHF fail to navigate nuanced ethical scenarios where safety and ethics conflict.

signals.title: NeuralGCM Climate Modeling: Matching 10-15 Day Forecasts with 1000x Computational Savings

content.abstract: NeuralGCM matches traditional climate models for 10-15 day forecasts with enormous computational savings. NVIDIA's StormCast super-resolves atmospheric data 1000x faster using 3000x less energy.

signals.title: Addressing Logical Fallacies in Scientific Reasoning from LLMs: Dual-Inference Framework

content.abstract: Introduces dual-reasoning training framework extending beyond affirmation-based inference. Models trained to affirm valid consequents while rejecting invalid inferences, improving alignment with human scientific reasoning by 41%.

signals.title: Embodied AI: Emerging Risks and Opportunities for Policy Action

content.abstract: Policy framework for embodied AI regulation at the intersection of agentic AI and classical robotics. Identifies 12 risk categories and proposes graduated regulatory approach based on autonomy level.
